name: Huperzine B
description: Huperzine B is a novel acetylcholinesterase inhibitor.
indication: Under investigation for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease.
mechanismOfAction: Huperzine B has been found to be an inhibitor of the enzyme acetylcholinesterase. This is the same mechanism of action of pharmaceutical drugs such as galantamine and donepezil used to treat Alzheimer's disease.
pharmacodynamics: Huperzine B is an alkaloid derived from Huperzia serrata (which is available as an herbal product in the US). It is under investigation as an acetylcholinesterase inhibitor. Clinical trials in China have shown that huperzine B is comparably effective to the drugs currently on the market, and may even be somewhat safer in terms of side effects.
